context: dominance) Supply:   posterior third of ventricular septum + diaphragmatic segment of LV + posteromedial papillary muscle RCA and LCx (2-10%) Supply:   posterior interventricular septum, interatrial septum, AV node, His bundle √  penetrates base of posterior interatrial septum at crux √  may course beneath endocardium near ostium of coronary sinus + septal isthmus ◊  High risk for AV nodal artery coagulation during RF ablation!
